metadata.description: SmartGenie's marketplace — governed, spec-first AI software delivery tools for Claude Code. Requires Claude Code v2.1.154 or later.

plugins.name: devgenie
plugins.description: Governed, spec-first AI software delivery: a gated bootstrap (foundation -> independent rating gate -> Phase 0 scaffold -> benchmarked slice builds), integration-first slices, and per-task token metering. Lite is free and online (full feature capture + a real MVP build); Pro builds and gates the production scope from the same captured spec and unlocks the independent signed rating gate, premium templates, an audit-grade decision trail and AI-spend chargeback.
